title: Financial Snapshot Persistence — purchases posting freeze
scope: Option A — Prisma fields (PurchaseDocument + SaleDocument) + purchases/post snapshot freeze. Sales posting deferred → Task 68B.3.

checks.name: schema — PurchaseDocument has 5 snapshot fields
checks.what: totalNetAmount + totalVatAmount + totalGrossAmount + journalEntryId + postedAt present in PurchaseDocument model

checks.name: schema — SaleDocument has 5 snapshot fields (prepared for 68B.3)
checks.what: same 5 fields on SaleDocument — reserved for next task, no migration needed later

checks.name: purchases/post — writes financial snapshot
checks.what: step 11 includes the 5 snapshot fields in tx.purchaseDocument.update
checks.url: bash -c 'grep -cE "totalNetAmount: new Decimal|totalVatAmount: new Decimal|totalGrossAmount: new Decimal|journalEntryId: journalEntry.id|postedAt: new Date" app/api/company/\[companyId\]/purchases/\[purchaseId\]/post/route.ts'

checks.name: migration — SQL file present
checks.what: Prisma-convention migration directory exists with migration.sql

checks.name: runtime — post DRAFT purchase returns 200 with accounting block
checks.what: POST /purchases/{id}/post returns 200 + journalEntryId + populated totals on the document row
checks.url: echo 'manual: post a DRAFT purchase via UI or curl, then verify SELECT id, status, totalNetAmount, totalVatAmount, totalGrossAmount, journalEntryId, postedAt FROM purchase_documents WHERE id=...'

checks.name: runtime — double-post still blocked (409)
checks.what: second POST on same purchaseId returns 409 ALREADY_POSTED
checks.url: echo 'manual: repeat the POST above — expect HTTP 409 + {"error":"Purchase already posted"}'

checks.name: invariant — DRAFT rows still NULL on snapshot fields
checks.what: existing DRAFT rows untouched — snapshot fields remain NULL
checks.url: echo 'manual: SELECT id, status, totalNetAmount, journalEntryId, postedAt FROM purchase_documents WHERE status=DRAFT LIMIT 5; — expect all NULL'

checks.name: invariant — POSTED totalGrossAmount equals journal debit sum
checks.what: totalGrossAmount on document equals SUM(journal_lines.debit) for its journalEntryId — proves snapshot integrity
checks.url: echo 'manual: SELECT p.totalGrossAmount, (SELECT SUM(jl.debit) FROM journal_lines jl WHERE jl.journalEntryId=p.journalEntryId) FROM purchase_documents p WHERE p.status=POSTED LIMIT 5;'
